title: kiokuConflictRecord
description: Schema for conflict-resolution records. Modeled after STALE benchmark (arxiv 2605.06527). Written by the conflict-scan cron, surfaced in _meta/dashboard.md and the Web dashboard.

memory_a.description: ID of the first (typically newer) memory.

memory_b.description: ID of the second (typically older) memory.

similarity.description: Cosine similarity between the two memories' embeddings.

predicate_opposed.description: True if the LLM judge marked memory_a and memory_b as making opposing claims.

resolution.description: Auto-resolution decision (newer wins by default) or user override.

explanation.description: LLM-generated rationale for the resolution. Read by humans during weekly review.
